ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the competition was held */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the competition (e.g., SSB, CW) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the competition (e.g., SINGLE-OP, MULTI-OP) */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band used in the competition (e.g., ALL, 160M) */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power level used in the competition (e.g., LOW, HIGH) */,
  "overlay" TEXT /* Overlay type used in the competition (e.g., NONE, TB-WIRES, WIRE-ONLY) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition was held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the competition */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL link to the competition rules */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the participant belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the competition */,
  "assisted" TEXT /* Whether the participant was assisted (A) or not (None) */,
  "so2r" TEXT /* Whether the participant used SO2R (Single Operator Two Receivers) or not (None) */,
  "qso" INTEGER /* Number of QSOs (Qualified Stations Operated) made by the participant */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored by the participant */,
  "mult" INTEGER /* Multiplier used in the competition */,
  "score" REAL /* Final score of the participant */,
  "certificate_url" TEXT /* URL link to the participant's certificate */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the participant */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., organizer, participant, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation log */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., registered, confirmed, completed) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
